## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New probe
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (provider, storage backend, CLI command, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/`
- [ ] Lint passes: `ruff check promptcanary/`
- [ ] Type check passes: `mypy promptcanary/`
- [ ] New tests added covering the happy path, failure path, and at least one edge case
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated on all public classes and methods
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/`) if this changes public API or CLI behavior

## Related issue(s)

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Relates to #456" -->

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know: design tradeoffs, screenshots, etc. -->
